summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Natal Chart features (SVG download, PDF export, DOCX export). All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed all 3 download buttons visible and functional. PDF and DOCX exports include chart images (~85KB and ~114KB respectively). Aspect field names correctly use planet1_name/planet2_name. Quadratura aspect filter working.
